One actionable finding was fixed. Here's the summary:

**One bug found and fixed:**

`hud.ts` and `results.ts` both had `PERSONAS` (and `TEMP_POWERUP_META`, `TEMP_POWERUP_MAX_DURATIONS`) moved into `import type` statements. These are runtime `const` values — putting them in `import type` causes TypeScript to erase them at compile time, breaking all persona color lookups and powerup ...(truncated)
